geometry:review_of_algebra.reason: Geometry algebra review needs multi-step equations and simplifying radicals from Algebra 1.

geometry:basics_of_geometry.reason: Points, lines, and angles need number sense and algebraic measure equations.

geometry:parallel_lines_and_the_coordina.reason: Parallel lines and coordinate geometry use angle basics plus linear graphs/slope.

geometry:congruent_triangles.reason: Triangle congruence builds on angle and segment basics.

geometry:properties_of_triangles.reason: Midsegments, medians, and triangle inequalities extend congruence work.

geometry:quadrilaterals_and_polygons.reason: Polygon/quadrilateral properties use angle facts and prior area intuition.

geometry:similarity.reason: Similarity uses proportions and triangle congruence concepts.

geometry:right_triangles.reason: Pythagorean and special right triangles need similarity and square roots.

geometry:trigonometry.reason: Right-triangle trig ratios are defined on right triangles.

geometry:surface_area_and_volume.reason: Solid measures extend polygon area and prior volume work.

geometry:circles.reason: Circle theorems use angle/segment basics and often right triangles.

geometry:transformations.reason: Rigid motions and dilations act on the plane with coordinate tools.

geometry:probability_and_statistics.reason: Counting and probability need number operations and data context.

geometry:constructions.reason: Constructions formalize congruence and basic geometric objects.
